seo.title: Corporate Lawyer in Lahore | SECP, Contracts & Disputes — Saeed Law Firm
seo.description: Corporate lawyer in Lahore for company incorporation (SECP), contract drafting, shareholder disputes, M&A, and commercial litigation under Companies Act 2017.

hero.intro: Corporate lawyer in Lahore for company incorporation (SECP), contract drafting, shareholder disputes, M&A, and commercial litigation under Companies Act 2017.

bodyMarkdown:
A **corporate lawyer in Lahore** works on time pressure, paper discipline, and cross-functional coordination — SECP filings, contract drafting, tax-aligned structuring, and litigation defence often run in parallel for the same client. **Saeed Law Firm** has handled corporate work in Lahore since the original Companies Ordinance 1984 era, transitioning practice to the Companies Act 2017 on its enactment. We file with SECP, draft commercial contracts, run shareholder dispute litigation, and represent companies before the Lahore High Court Companies Bench.

### Corporate Law in Pakistan — Statutes Your Lawyer Must Know

- **Companies Act 2017** — primary corporate statute (replaced Companies Ordinance 1984)
- **Partnership Act 1932** — registered partnerships
- **Limited Liability Partnership Act 2017** — LLP structures
- **Contract Act 1872** — contractual disputes
- **Arbitration Act 1940** and **Recognition and Enforcement (Arbitration Agreements and Foreign Arbitral Awards) Act 2011** — domestic and foreign-seated arbitration
- **Securities Act 2015** and Pakistan Stock Exchange Regulations — listed companies
- **Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance 2001** — banking court matters

### Corporate Services We Provide

- **Company incorporation** — Private Limited, Single Member Company (SMC), Public Limited, NPO under Section 42
- **SECP filings** — Form A (annual return), Form 29 (director changes), Form 7 (charge filings), Form 1 (commencement of business)
- **Contract drafting** — service agreements, distribution and franchise agreements, employment contracts, NDAs, MOUs, IP assignments, joint venture agreements
- **Shareholder agreements** — buy-sell, drag-along, tag-along, right of first refusal, vesting schedules
- **Shareholder disputes** — minority oppression and mismanagement under Sections 286–290 of the Companies Act 2017
- **Mergers and acquisitions** — due diligence, share purchase agreements, asset purchase, post-completion compliance
- **Director liability defence**
- **Commercial litigation** at Lahore Civil Courts and the LHC Companies Bench
- **Arbitration** — drafting arbitration clauses, conducting domestic arbitration, enforcement of foreign awards
- **Banking litigation** under FIO 2001

### SECP Lawyer in Lahore — Filings and Compliance

A serious **SECP lawyer in Lahore** treats compliance as a calendar discipline, not a reactive function. Annual filings, Form 29 changes within statutory windows, charge filings within 30 days of creation, and AGM compliance all carry penalties for default. We run SECP-compliance retainers for Lahore-based companies — the cost of compliance is dramatically lower than the cost of remedying default.

### Contract Lawyer in Lahore — What We Draft

Drafting quality compounds. A weak distribution agreement signed today turns into a multi-year dispute later. The contracts we draft most frequently for Lahore-based businesses include service and consultancy agreements, distribution and franchise agreements, employment contracts and HR policy frameworks, NDAs and IP assignment deeds, joint venture and shareholder agreements, loan and security documents, and commercial leases.

### Where Corporate Disputes Are Heard in Lahore

- **Civil Courts Lahore** — money suits, contract enforcement, recovery
- **Lahore High Court Companies Bench** — winding-up petitions, oppression and mismanagement (Sections 286, 290), schemes of arrangement
- **Banking Courts Lahore** — Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance 2001 matters
- **Arbitration tribunals** — where contracts contain arbitration clauses
- **Lahore High Court** — writ jurisdiction over SECP, registrar of firms, and other regulators

### Common Corporate Issues for Lahore-Based Businesses

- **Gulberg / DHA Phase 5 / Johar Town corporate offices:** typical issues are commercial leases, employee disputes, vendor non-payment, and SECP compliance gaps from rapid growth
- **Manufacturing in Sundar / Quaid-e-Azam Industrial Estate:** vendor contracts, labour, environmental compliance, sales tax registration
- **Listed companies on PSX:** securities compliance, related-party transactions, board independence

### Best Corporate Lawyer in Lahore — How to Choose

The criteria for engaging a **best corporate lawyer in Lahore** practice: (1) Companies Act 2017 fluency, including the SECP regulations under it; (2) drafting discipline — request sample contracts; (3) coordination with tax counsel for structuring; (4) familiarity with the LHC Companies Bench if litigation is foreseeable; (5) responsiveness — corporate work is deadline-driven and a 48-hour turnaround on routine queries is the floor, not the ceiling.

### Timeline and Fees

- **Pvt Ltd incorporation:** 7–14 days, fixed package
- **SMC incorporation:** 5–10 days, fixed package
- **Annual SECP retainer:** monthly or annual fixed fee
- **Contract drafting:** per-document fixed fee or retainer
- **Shareholder dispute litigation:** stage-based at LHC Companies Bench
- **M&A:** project-based, quoted at scoping stage
- **Arbitration:** stage-based

### Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does company incorporation take in Pakistan?**
Routine Pvt Ltd incorporation through SECP eServices takes 7–14 days from name reservation to certificate of incorporation. SMCs are faster. Public limited companies and NPOs (Section 42 licences) take longer due to additional regulatory steps.

**What is the difference between Pvt Ltd and SMC under the Companies Act 2017?**
Pvt Ltd requires at least two members and two directors. Single Member Company (SMC) allows one member and one director with a nominee director provision under Section 168. Both are limited-liability vehicles with similar compliance regimes.

**Can shareholders sue directors for mismanagement in Pakistan?**
Yes. Sections 286–290 of the Companies Act 2017 allow members alleging oppression or mismanagement to petition the Lahore High Court Companies Bench. Standing requires the threshold shareholding specified in the Act.

**Is an arbitration clause enforceable in Pakistani contracts?**
Yes. Arbitration clauses are enforceable under the Arbitration Act 1940 (domestic) and the Recognition and Enforcement (Arbitration Agreements and Foreign Arbitral Awards) Act 2011 (foreign-seated). The clause must specify the seat, applicable law, and procedure clearly to avoid enforceability challenges.

**How much does a corporate lawyer in Lahore charge?**
Incorporations are fixed-package. SECP retainers are monthly. Contract drafting is per-document. Litigation is stage-based. Written fee proposals before engagement.

### Related Lahore practice pages

Corporate work frequently combines with tax, civil, and property matters. See our [tax lawyer in Lahore](/tax-lawyer-in-lahore), [civil lawyer in Lahore](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore), and [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) pages for the cross-cutting workstreams. Companies Act 2017 disputes are heard at the LHC Companies Bench — see [lawyer at Lahore High Court](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court) — while general commercial disputes go to [the District Court at Aiwan-e-Adal](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore). For Gulberg-based and DHA-based businesses, see our [Gulberg](/areas/lawyer-in-gulberg-lahore) and [DHA Lahore](/areas/lawyer-in-dha-lahore) area pages. To meet Bilal Saeed, Advocate, [book a consultation](/contact-us).

details.label: Where Corporate Lawyer Cases Are Heard

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.

relatedPages.description: Civil lawyer in Lahore handling suits for declaration, possession, recovery, specific performance, and damages at Civil Courts and Lahore High Court.

relatedPages.title: Tax Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Tax lawyer in Lahore. We handle income tax notices, FBR audits, Commissioner Appeals, and Tax Tribunal cases. 50+ years' practice in Lahore.
